name: Het Mooiste Plekkie
overview: Overijssel is bursting with special places and stories. But what is truly the most beautiful spot? Is it that historic square, the purple heather, or that iconic view over the river? In the new TV series and photo contest *Het Mooiste Plekkie* (The Most Beautiful Spot), RTV Oost goes in search of the most special and sometimes still undiscovered places in Overijssel, through the lens of its residents. Who will take the most surprising photo?
